notifications.MATCH_SCORE_PROPOSAL_MESSAGE:
⚠️ Proposed score: {{scoreA}} - {{scoreB}}
Please confirm or contest this result before the deadline.

emails.password_reset_text:
Hello,

You requested a password reset.

Click the following link to reset your password:
{{url}}

This link will expire in {{expiresIn}} minutes.

If you did not request this reset, you can ignore this email.

Best regards,
The Skol Team
emails.password_reset_html:
Password Reset

Hello,

You requested a password reset.

Reset My Password

This link will expire in {{expiresIn}} minutes.

If you did not request this reset, you can ignore this email.

Best regards,
The Skol Team

errors.INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS: You do not have the necessary permissions
errors.TOURNAMENT_INVALID_STATUS: Tournament must be open or ongoing
errors.TOURNAMENT_CLOSED: Tournament is not open for registration
errors.TOURNAMENT_CANNOT_BE_DELETED: Only draft tournaments can be deleted
errors.TOURNAMENT_FIELD_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN: Cannot update fields {{fields}} after tournament is no longer in draft status
errors.TOURNAMENT_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS: A tournament with this name already exists
errors.INVALID_DATE_RANGE: Start date must be before end date
errors.MAX_DRAFT_TOURNAMENTS_EXCEEDED: You cannot have more than {{max}} draft tournaments
errors.ALREADY_REGISTERED: You are already registered for this tournament
errors.NOT_REGISTERED: You are not registered for this tournament
errors.CANNOT_LEAVE_ONGOING_TOURNAMENT: Cannot leave an ongoing or finished tournament
errors.MATCH_INVALID_TEAMS: For static teams, teamAId and teamBId are required
errors.MATCH_INVALID_PLAYERS: For flex teams, playerIdsA and playerIdsB are required
errors.MATCH_DRAW_NOT_ALLOWED: Draws are not allowed in this tournament
errors.MATCH_SCORE_OUT_OF_RANGE: Score is outside the allowed range for this tournament
errors.MATCH_SAME_REPORTER_CONFIRMER: The same user cannot report and confirm the result
errors.MATCH_TEAM_SIZE_MISMATCH: The number of players in teamA ({{teamASize}}) and teamB ({{teamBSize}}) must be the same
errors.MAX_MATCHES_EXCEEDED: {{playerName}} has reached the maximum number of matches ({{max}})
errors.MAX_PARTNER_MATCHES_EXCEEDED: Team {{teamName}} has already played {{max}} times together
errors.MAX_OPPONENT_MATCHES_EXCEEDED: Team {{teamName}} has already played {{max}} times against team {{opponentTeamName}}
errors.NOT_A_PARTICIPANT: Only participants can perform this action
errors.PLAYER_NOT_IN_TOURNAMENT: Player is not participating in this tournament
errors.TEAM_NOT_IN_TOURNAMENT: Team is not participating in this tournament
errors.BRACKET_CANNOT_REGENERATE: Cannot regenerate bracket for a tournament in this state
errors.SOURCE_TOURNAMENT_NOT_FINISHED: Source tournament is not finished yet
errors.INVALID_RESET_TOKEN: The reset link is invalid or has expired
errors.INVITATION_CODE_REQUIRED: Invitation code is required for account registration
errors.INVITATION_CODE_EXHAUSTED: This invitation code has reached its maximum usage limit
errors.INVITATION_CODE_INACTIVE: This invitation code has been deactivated
errors.INVITATION_CODE_ALREADY_USED: You have already used an invitation code
